parameters.comparison_norm: mass-lumped boundary L2 on nodal flux exact_weak_flux / lumped_mass
parameters.fem_policy: volumetric P1 radial-fan FEM Schur complement baseline
parameters.q_correction: harmonic moment reproduction through degree 2 plus projected zeta-tail harmonic multipoles
parameters.q_policy: matrix-free planar chord QJet; no dense Q matrix stored
parameters.truth: analytic manufactured harmonic fields; exact weak boundary flux integrated on polygon edges
